text.title: Agency Pipeline Hygiene 15min Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping artefact state to a rule.

branch.when: time_over == false AND items_missing == false AND hot_missing_next == true
time_over == false AND items_missing == false AND hot_missing_next == false AND loss_untagged == true
time_over == false AND items_missing == false AND hot_missing_next == false AND loss_untagged == false AND source_untagged == true

conclusion.verdict: apply source tag on new opps

branch.when: time_over == false AND items_missing == false AND hot_missing_next == false AND loss_untagged == false AND source_untagged == false

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: time_over=false, items_missing=false, hot_missing_next=false, loss_untagged=false, source_untagged=false → accept routine.
